title: Advanced Usage
text: build_report() accepts exactly one : chat_fn, function signature (system_prompt, user_prompt) chat, ellmer chat object inheriting Chat neither supplied, pkgreviewr look local Ollama model PKGREVIEWR_OLLAMA_MODEL OLLAMA_MODEL.

title: Advanced Usage
text: Use chat_fn already provider SDK want full control retry logic, authentication, logging.
code: library(pkgreviewr)  my_chat_fn <- function(system_prompt, user_prompt) {   stop("Connect your provider here") }  report <- build_report(   "https://github.com/dvdscripter/ini",   chat_fn = my_chat_fn )

title: Advanced Usage
text: Use chat want hand pkgreviewr preconfigured chat object. ellmer package documentation covers construct provider-specific chat objects chat_openai(), chat_anthropic(), chat_ollama(): https://ellmer.tidyverse.org.
code: library(ellmer) library(pkgreviewr)  chat <- chat_openai(model = "gpt-4.1-mini")  report <- build_report(   "https://github.com/dvdscripter/ini",   chat = chat )

title: Advanced Usage
text: Set artifact_dir want inspect keep intermediate files. pkgreviewr writes: formatted review data metadata section context section system prompts section summaries, bodies, traces synthesis prompts trace draft final reports provenance describing prompt templates used
code: artifacts <- tempfile("pkgreviewr-artifacts-")  report <- build_report(   "https://github.com/dvdscripter/ini",   chat = chat,   artifact_dir = artifacts )  attr(report, "artifact_dir")

title: Advanced Usage
text: Independent review sections can generated parallel. mainly useful selected backend can tolerate concurrent requests host system spare cores.
code: report <- build_report(   "https://github.com/dvdscripter/ini",   chat = chat,   parallel = TRUE,   workers = 2L )

title: Advanced Usage
text: can inspect collected local evidence generating report. useful want debug collector, tailor prompts, compare local evidence final section output.

title: pkgreviewr
text: pkgreviewr reviews R packages section-based workflow. gathers deterministic QA signals locally, builds targeted context review section, asks LLM concise section outputs, synthesizes overall diagnostic section summaries, can persist intermediate artifacts debugging. current stable user-facing entry points : collect_review_data() deterministic signal collection build_report() end--end report generation Project website: https://alekoure.github.io/pkgreviewr/

title: pkgreviewr
text: Use custom backend function want manage provider integration : Use ellmer chat object want ready-made provider client. ellmer reference constructing chat objects https://ellmer.tidyverse.org. Use local Ollama backend setting model name calling build_report():
code: library(pkgreviewr)  my_chat_fn <- function(system_prompt, user_prompt) {   stop("Connect your preferred chat backend here") }  build_report(   "https://github.com/dvdscripter/ini",   chat_fn = my_chat_fn ) library(ellmer) library(pkgreviewr)  chat <- chat_openai(model = "gpt-4.1-mini")  build_report(   "https://github.com/dvdscripter/ini",   chat = chat ) export PKGREVIEWR_OLLAMA_MODEL=llama3.2

what: Build a package review report. — build_report
title: Build a package review report. — build_report
text: build_report() main end-user entry point. collects deterministic package diagnostics, generates report sections independently, synthesizes overall assessment section summaries, optionally persists intermediate artifacts, writes final markdown report disk.

title: Build a package review report. — build_report
code: build_report(   package_url,   output_path = "test_review.md",   chat_fn = NULL,   chat = NULL,   parallel = FALSE,   workers = 1L,   artifact_dir = NULL )

title: Build a package review report. — build_report
text: package_url Repository URL review. output_path Output path generated markdown report. chat_fn Optional chat function signature (system_prompt, user_prompt). chat Optional ellmer chat object inheriting Chat. parallel Whether generate independent review sections parallel possible. workers Number workers use parallel = TRUE. artifact_dir Optional directory persisted prompts, traces, section context, intermediate reports.

title: Build a package review report. — build_report
text: Invisibly returns pkgreviewr_report character vector attached draft report, section results, section traces, artifact path, provenance metadata.

title: Build a package review report. — build_report
text: Supply exactly one backend source chat_fn chat, configure local Ollama model via PKGREVIEWR_OLLAMA_MODEL OLLAMA_MODEL. See ellmer package documentation provider-specific chat object constructors ellmer::chat_openai().

title: Build a package review report. — build_report
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ my_chat_fn <- function(system_prompt, user_prompt) {   stop("Connect your preferred chat backend here") }  report <- build_report(   "https://github.com/dvdscripter/ini",   chat_fn = my_chat_fn,   artifact_dir = tempfile("pkgreviewr-artifacts-") )  chat <- ellmer::chat_openai(model = "gpt-4.1-mini")  build_report(   "https://github.com/dvdscripter/ini",   chat = chat,   parallel = TRUE,   workers = 2L ) } # }

title: Audit report - ini
text: Reviewed source: https://github.com/dvdscripter/ini Preview: package demonstrates strong documentation test coverage requires critical correctness fixes opaque crash read.ini structural improvements meet rOpenSci standards. Overall, package reliable well-documented needs immediate attention critical crash bug performance refactoring fully meets rOpenSci tidyverse standards.

title: Audit report - ini
text: Excellent test coverage (97.73%) R/ini.R, indicating thorough validation parsing writing logic. Proper resource management using .exit(close(con)) read.ini write.ini prevent connection leaks. Comprehensive roxygen2 documentation executable @examples exported functions. Passes R CMD check ---cran zero errors zero warnings. Focused, intuitive API consisting two complementary functions explicit encoding support.

title: Audit report - ini
text: Add least one HTML vignette package-level documentation (?ini-package) meet rOpenSci structural compliance. Handle key-value pairs appear first section header; currently, lastSection undefined scenario, leading dropped data errors. Replace custom index() character--character loop vectorized base R functions like regexpr() strsplit(..., fixed = TRUE) find = delimiter; current implementation inefficient -engineered. Fix documentation typos read.ini write.ini (e.g., “specifield” “specified”). Address tidyverse style linter warnings: rename functions read_ini/write_ini (provide snake_case aliases), use <- instead = assignment, use double quotes consistently, remove explicit return(). Remove legacy .travis.yml file migrate continuous integration GitHub Actions.

title: Audit report - ini
text: read.ini(), replace custom index() helper manual string splicing strsplit(line, "=", fixed = TRUE) regmatches() existing keyValueREGEXP match vectorized key-value extraction. Remove internal trim() function use base R trimws(). Simplify read.ini() file reading calling readLines(con) , iterating character vector instead using (TRUE) loop single-line reads. Replace awkward list-append--rename pattern read.ini() direct named assignment: ini[[last_section]][[key]] <- value. Refactor write.ini() iteration looping names(x[[section]]) accessing values via x[[section]][[key_name]], removing need subset list extract names inside loop. Adopt snake_case internal variables (e.g., section_regexp) function names.

title: Audit report - ini
text: Crash global key-value pairs: read.ini() encounters key-value line [section] header, fails Error: object 'lastSection' found instead handling line gracefully providing clear user-facing message. common INI file pattern poses significant usability correctness risk. Fragile internal parsing logic: custom index() helper manual string splicing bypass R’s robust string matching tools, creating potential edge-case errors.

title: Audit report - ini
text: Session Info: R 4.4.0 running Ubuntu 22.04.4 LTS (x86_64). Naming: read.ini, equalPosition, sectionREGEXP, keyValueREGEXP conform snake_case (object_name_linter). Syntax: Used = instead <- assignment (assignment_linter), missing space ( loop (spaces_left_parentheses_linter), single quotes instead double quotes (quotes_linter), explicit return() call (return_linter). Hidden file .travis.yml included package root. Unable verify current time future file timestamps. Code Coverage: 97.73% R/ini.R.

title: pkgreviewr 0.1.0
text: Initial section-based review workflow. Added pkgdown site configuration deployment workflow.
